synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19535 Oracle Linux 9 firewalld bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19535
description:
[1.3.4-15]
- fix(policy): rich: verify ipset exists

[1.3.4-14]
- fix(systemd): allow start code 251 (RUNNING_BUT_FAILED)

[1.3.4-13]
- fix(fw): start: remove ipset probe

[1.3.4-12]
- fix(systemd): verify firewalld is responsive to dbus

[1.3.4-11]
- test: add scale keyword to scale tests

[1.3.4-10]
- test(functions): fix iptables normalization for opt field
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19535

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19535.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
firewall-applet-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewall-config-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewalld-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewalld-filesystem-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
python3-firewall-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
firewall-applet-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewall-config-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewalld-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
firewalld-filesystem-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm
python3-firewall-1.3.4-15.el9_6.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/firewalld-1.3.4-15.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.3.4-15]
- fix(policy): rich: verify ipset exists

[1.3.4-14]
- fix(systemd): allow start code 251 (RUNNING_BUT_FAILED)

[1.3.4-13]
- fix(fw): start: remove ipset probe

[1.3.4-12]
- fix(systemd): verify firewalld is responsive to dbus

[1.3.4-11]
- test: add scale keyword to scale tests

[1.3.4-10]
- test(functions): fix iptables normalization for opt field
